blocked_reason: Existing single InferenceSession/server cache path cannot safely change active batch rows across late-arrival ticks; M4Pro live run failed with server/cache batch-size mismatch and then client fail-closed fewer-row guard.
live_error: RuntimeError('live continuous batching server returned fewer rows than the active tick batch')
next_engineering_step: Add server-side per-request slot/cache-position ownership for dynamic continuous batching, or implement a true multi-request server queue instead of varying one InferenceSession batch shape.
